review_title: Easy-Peasy.AI is an incredible chatbot platform!
description: Easy-Peasy.AI is an incredible chatbot platform! It's user-friendly, intelligent, and provides accurate and helpful responses. I'm amazed by its capabilities and how it adapts to my needs. I am highly satisfied with the service and would highly recommend it to anyone who is looking for an AI tool for their content writing needs.
author: Nermin S.
pros: It's smart, helpful, and provides accurate information. Offers 90+ copywriting templates.
cons: The UI could a bit more modern...but this is highly subjective.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic for work and personal life
description: I’ve been finding more and more things to do with it. Emails, message responses a notes for my job. I don’t have to worry so much about grammar either!
author: Julia H.
pros: All the templates and prompts. I also love that you can make your own template and the fact that it gives ideas on how to get the best results. I’m finding I barely need to edit things out or add anything to the text once it’s done. It’s great!
cons: More monthly plan options! It would be great to add on more words is needed without having to upgrade my plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Eghosa E.
pros: The fact that it gives me an idea and help me tailor my thoughts towards achieving my desire
cons: The pricing should a bit be lower than what it is now, otherwise other things are ok

description: We use this to generate social media tags, insights into popular trends and this is helping us reach a wider audience.
author: Craig K.
pros: I wasn't sure at first how much I would use it when upgrading but it's so easy to use and the response time is instance, 2 things I really love about the tool.
cons: The AI images can sometimes be a little strange but normally 1 in 3-4 images i get what i am looking for.

review_title: Easy-Peasy AI Helps Us Write Faster and Smarter
description: My overall experience is great, and I have to recommend the tool to others.
author: Max R.
pros: Easy of use with feature requests supported by their team
cons: Still newbies with high potential if features get adjusted
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is really good and better than others. It is very economical also.
author: Gaurav C.
pros: The pricing and ease of use. I found them to be faster than others.
cons: the logo should be changed to have a more professional look
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experience overall. I’ve been using AI since February.
author: Delois P.
pros: It’s very intuitive and easy to use. Great for novice users or those wanting an AI tool that is user friendly. The prompts are a great addition.
cons: Nothing yet. Only been using for a few days.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Life is easy with Easy peasy
author: Jeriel Rosh P.
pros: Very user-friendly and almost have all the answers to all my questions. You have a lot of formats to choose from. The customer service is very active. its really on point about what you are looking for
cons: No unlimited words are offer. I hope they will offer it soon so many people can enjoy and have the opportunity to use their site
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Easy Peasy AI is a fantastic tool that makes training custom AI models a breeze
author: ronit S.
pros: Easy Peasy AI is a fantastic tool that makes training custom AI models a breeze. The intuitive interface allows you to quickly upload your data and configure your model settings without needing any technical expertise. Training runs fast and the resulting models are highly accurate for a wide range of applications. Plus, the affordable pricing plans make powerful AI accessible even for individuals and small businesses. I've been impressed with the results and would highly recommend Easy Peasy AI to anyone looking to leverage custom AI without the usual complexity. It's AI made easy!
cons: they dont have yet generation of shorts/reels/mp4
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Darcy W.
pros: The UI is easy to understand and lovely to use.
cons: The limited words thing is a bother but everyone has to make money so I get it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
